nasb.text: Therefore, you shall keep the commandments of the Lord your God, to walk in His ways and to fear Him.

esv.text: So you shall keep the commandments of the Lord your God by walking in his ways and by fearing him.

cnv.text: 所以你要謹守耶和華你的　神的誡命，遵行他的道路，敬畏他。

ccb.text: “所以，你们要遵守你们的上帝耶和华的诫命，行祂的道，敬畏祂，
